prompt: Generate a story with at least 200 words
constraints: No words should be longer than 10 characters
The word 'Llama' should appear at least 3 times
The word 'Python' should appear at least 3 times
The word 'Llama' should appear at least once before the first occurrence of the word 'Python'
The word 'Python' should appear at least once after the last occurrence of the word 'Llama'
There can only be 1 word of character length 8
output_format: Output only the story string with no newlines
full_content:
Case 3: Story Generation  
Generate a story with at least 200 words

* No words should be longer than 10 characters  
* The word 'Llama' should appear at least 3 times  
* The word 'Python' should appear at least 3 times  
* The word 'Llama' should appear at least once before the first occurrence of the word 'Python'  
* The word 'Python' should appear at least once after the last occurrence of the word 'Llama'  
* There can only be 1 word of character length 8

Output format: Output only the story string with no newlines
